Uncommented the @Test annotation to register the method as a JUnit test case.

src/test/java/com/kv/demo/jackson/demo/D.general_idea: Added a call to DemoApplication.main within the test to explicitly trigger application startup.
Added a trivial assertTrue assertion to satisfy JUnit test structure requirements.
Added a print statement generating a random UUID, likely for debugging or verifying runtime execution.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK target.
Add Spring Boot Actuator starter to enable production-ready features like health checks and metrics.
Update Lombok dependency to a newer version compatible with the project requirements.
Remove the deprecated Spring Boot Log4j starter dependency.
Refactor commons-io version to use a managed property for consistency.
Refactor commons-lang3 version to use a managed property for consistency.
Add JaCoCo Maven plugin dependency to enable code coverage reporting.
Add SpringDoc OpenAPI UI dependency to generate interactive API documentation.
Add Swagger annotations dependency for API documentation support.
Add javax.annotation-api dependency to provide annotations removed from the JDK module system in newer Java versions.
Add SpotBugs annotations dependency for static code analysis support.
Add pluginManagement section to standardize versions of core Maven plugins.
Configure JaCoCo plugin executions to prepare agent and generate reports during the build.
Configure Maven Surefire plugin to enable parallel test execution for faster builds.
Add OpenAPI Generator Maven plugin to generate Java model classes from a YAML specification.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add generated documentation files to .gitignore to prevent committing auto-generated markdown.
